title: BigBear.ai Aims For Pentagon AI Growth As Contract Access Expands
text: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) has secured access to a significant U.S. Air Force contract vehicle, positioning the company to compete for artificial intelligence work across Department of Defense programs. The company was selected for a long term U.S. Air Force contract vehicle worth up to $900m, aimed at accelerating Pentagon AI initiatives. This award expands the defense contractor's ability to pursue AI-related opportunities throughout the broader defense sector. Trading at $3.99, the stock shows mixed results—up 8.4% over the past month but down 31.7% year-to-date. However, it has delivered a 47.8% return over the past twelve months. The stock trades approximately 25% below the consensus analyst target of $5.33, though Simply Wall St has not yet established a clear valuation position. Investors should note the company remains unprofitable and has experienced substantial shareholder dilution. The central question involves how effectively BigBear.ai converts this contract access into actual awarded work and sustainable defense relationships.
